tasks.title: Set up HTML file with M3 design tokens
tasks.notes:
Scaffold base HTML with Material Web imports, import map for @material/web, blue M3 tonal palette (#1565c0), Roboto font, Material Symbols, and responsive viewport meta tag.

Checklist:
☐ Create HTML file
☐ Add import map for @material/web
☐ Set blue primary color tokens (#1565c0)
☐ Add Roboto and Material Symbols font links
☐ Add responsive viewport meta tag
☐ Set spacious density and rounded shape tokens

tasks.title: Design color theme and tonal palette
tasks.notes:
Section 5 — Derive M3 tonal palette from blue base #1565c0. Neutral mood, light theme only.

Checklist:
☐ Generate tonal palette from #1565c0
☐ Set primary, on-primary, primary-container tokens
☐ Set surface and on-surface tokens
☐ Set error color tokens for validation states
☐ Verify contrast ratios meet WCAG AA

tasks.title: Design typography scale
tasks.notes:
Section 5 — Roboto for both primary and display. Spacious density with generous padding.

Checklist:
☐ Set Roboto as primary and display font
☐ Define headline, title, body, and label sizes
☐ Apply spacious density padding values

tasks.title: Build horizontal stepper component
tasks.notes:
Section 6 — Horizontal stepper showing 5 steps. Current step highlighted, completed steps show checkmark, clickable to revisit completed steps.

Checklist:
☐ Create stepper HTML structure with 5 steps
☐ Style active, completed, and upcoming step states
☐ Add checkmark icon for completed steps
☐ Make completed steps clickable for navigation
☐ Abbreviated labels on tablet, numbers-only on mobile

tasks.title: Build Step 1 — Personal Info form
tasks.notes:
Section 2/4 — Collect attendee details: full name, email, company, job title, dietary restrictions. Validation on required fields.

Checklist:
☐ Full name text field (required)
☐ Email text field with email type (required)
☐ Company / Organization text field (required)
☐ Job title text field (required)
☐ Dietary restrictions text field (optional)
☐ Required field validation with error states
☐ Next button to advance

tasks.title: Build Step 2 — Session selection timeslot grid
tasks.notes:
Section 2/4 — Grid/table of conference sessions across time slots and tracks. Clickable cells toggle selection with highlight.

Checklist:
☐ Create grid layout with time slots and tracks
☐ Add placeholder session data (4+ sessions)
☐ Implement click-to-toggle cell selection
☐ Highlight selected cells
☐ Display selected session count
☐ Next and Back buttons

tasks.title: Build Step 3 — Ticket tier selector
tasks.notes:
Section 2/4 — Three ticket tiers (Student $99, Standard $299, VIP $599) as radio-style cards. Only one selectable at a time.

Checklist:
☐ Student tier card ($99)
☐ Standard tier card ($299)
☐ VIP tier card ($599)
☐ Radio-style selection (one at a time)
☐ Visual highlight on selected tier

tasks.title: Build Step 3 — Add-on checkboxes
tasks.notes:
Section 4 — Optional add-ons: Workshop Pass ($79), Networking Dinner extra guest ($49), Conference T-shirt ($25). Independent toggle.

Checklist:
☐ Workshop Pass checkbox ($79)
☐ Networking Dinner checkbox ($49)
☐ Conference T-shirt checkbox ($25)
☐ Price calculation display
☐ Next and Back buttons

tasks.title: Build Step 4 — Payment form
tasks.notes:
Section 2/4 — Credit card payment form with card number, expiry, CVC, cardholder name, billing address, city, state, ZIP. All required.

Checklist:
☐ Card number field
☐ Expiration date field
☐ CVC field
☐ Cardholder name field
☐ Billing address field
☐ City, State, ZIP fields
☐ Form validation on all required fields
☐ Pay Now button

tasks.title: Build Step 4 — Order summary section
tasks.notes:
Section 4 — Sidebar/section showing selected ticket tier, add-ons, and total price alongside the payment form.

Checklist:
☐ Display selected ticket tier and price
☐ List selected add-ons
☐ Calculate and display total
☐ Side-by-side layout on desktop, stacked on mobile

tasks.title: Build Step 5 — Confirmation page
tasks.notes:
Section 2/4 — Success checkmark icon, 'Registration Complete!' headline, summary of registration details, Add to Calendar button.

Checklist:
☐ Success check_circle icon
☐ Registration Complete headline
☐ Summary card with name, email, ticket, sessions, total
☐ Add to Calendar button

tasks.title: Implement step transitions and animations
tasks.notes:
Section 6 — Fade/slide transitions between steps. Hover effects on buttons, cards, and selectable cells. Stepper state change transitions.

Checklist:
☐ Fade/slide transition between steps
☐ Hover effects on buttons and cards
☐ Hover effects on session grid cells
☐ Stepper state change animation

tasks.title: Implement form validation error states
tasks.notes:
Section 6 — Red outlines and error text on required fields when empty. Validate before allowing step advancement.

Checklist:
☐ Required field validation on Step 1
☐ Required field validation on Step 4
☐ Red outline + error text styling
☐ Block Next/Pay Now if validation fails

tasks.title: Implement Next/Back navigation logic
tasks.notes:
Section 6 — Next button validates and advances. Back button returns to previous step. Linear flow Step 1 through Step 5.

Checklist:
☐ Next button advances with validation
☐ Back button returns to previous step
☐ Update stepper state on navigation
☐ Hide Back on Step 1, hide Next on Step 5

tasks.title: Inject feedback review modal
tasks.notes:
Section 8 — Include the feedback modal overlay as specified in delivery requirements.

Checklist:
☐ Add feedback modal HTML/CSS/JS
☐ Position Review button in bottom-right
☐ Test approve/reject/feedback actions

tasks.title: Implement responsive breakpoints
tasks.notes:
Section 7 — Desktop (840px+): centered card max 720px, full stepper labels. Tablet (600-839px): abbreviated labels, horizontal scroll on grid. Mobile (<600px): step numbers only, stacked fields, summary above payment form.

Checklist:
☐ Desktop layout — centered card, horizontal stepper with labels
☐ Tablet layout — abbreviated stepper labels, grid scroll
☐ Mobile layout — number-only stepper, stacked fields
☐ Payment summary above form on mobile
☐ Verify no content hidden on any breakpoint

tasks.title: Final review and browser testing
tasks.notes:
End-to-end walkthrough of all 5 steps in Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. Verify all interactions, transitions, and responsive behavior.

Checklist:
☐ Test full flow in Chrome
☐ Test full flow in Edge
☐ Test full flow in Firefox
☐ Verify all step transitions work
☐ Verify form validation fires correctly
☐ Verify responsive behavior at all breakpoints

tasks.title: Accessibility check
tasks.notes:
WCAG 2.1 Level A and AA audit. Check color contrast, keyboard navigation through stepper and forms, ARIA labels, focus management on step transitions.

Checklist:
☐ Color contrast check (4.5:1 text, 3:1 UI)
☐ Keyboard navigation through all steps
☐ ARIA labels on form fields and stepper
☐ Focus management on step change
☐ Screen reader walkthrough
